% This is generated by ESQL's StNPointsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Example

```esql
FROM airport_city_boundaries
| WHERE abbrev == "CPH"
| EVAL points = ST_NPOINTS(city_boundary)
| KEEP abbrev, airport, points
```

| abbrev:keyword | airport:text | points:integer |
| --- | --- | --- |
| CPH | Copenhagen | 15 |
